subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth within a clear Book, and He it is Who vindicateth the truth through His signs, though the idolaters be averse. Verily have We favored thee with that which thou hast mentioned in the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی العظیم. سبحان الذی نزل الآیات بالحق فی کتاب مبین و هو الذی یحق الحق بآیاته و لو کره المشرکون و لقد منناک بما ذکرت فی الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
